message:
fix(service): replace panics with PolledAfterCompletion errors in Buffer, Hedge, and Steer futures

Systematically replace Done-state panics across three more service
future types with proper error returns, completing the pattern
established in LoadShed, Timeout, and Barrier.

Buffer: Add BufferError::PolledAfterCompletion variant. BufferFutureState
Error variant now holds the error directly instead of Option<E>,
eliminating the "polled after completion" expect on the Option. Done
state returns the new error variant instead of panicking. Updated
Display, Error::source, and test coverage.

Hedge: Add HedgeError::PolledAfterCompletion variant. HedgeFutureState
Done state returns the error instead of panicking. Updated Display,
Error::source, and new error_polled_after_completion_display test.

Steer: Add SteerError::PolledAfterCompletion variant. SteerFuture Done
state returns the error instead of panicking. New FailService test
helper. Updated Display, Error::source, and new test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
